client_request: We need a system where customers can book appointments online, get reminders, and the admin team can manage bookings.

projectOverview.clientDescription: We need a system where customers can book appointments online, get reminders, and the admin team can manage bookings.
projectOverview.cleanDescription: A web-based system designed to facilitate online appointment scheduling for customers, provide automated reminders, and enable administrative staff to efficiently manage and oversee all bookings.
projectOverview.businessGoal: To enhance customer convenience through online appointment booking, streamline administrative booking management, and reduce operational inefficiencies associated with manual scheduling.

objectives: Enable customers to effortlessly book appointments online, accessible 24/7.
Automate appointment reminders to significantly reduce 'no-show' rates.
Provide administrators with comprehensive tools to efficiently manage all aspects of bookings, services, and availability.
Improve overall customer satisfaction and operational efficiency related to appointment scheduling.

stakeholders.description: Individuals who book, reschedule, or cancel appointments and receive reminders.
Team members responsible for managing appointments, services, availability, and customer records within the system.
Individuals overseeing the business operations and strategic direction, ensuring the system meets business objectives.
Personnel responsible for the deployment, maintenance, and technical support of the system.

functionalRequirements.title: Online Appointment Booking for Customers
functionalRequirements.description: The system shall allow authenticated customers to select a service, view real-time availability, and book an appointment online.
acceptance_criteria: The system shall display available time slots for selected services based on administrator-defined availability.
Customers shall be able to complete a booking process within 3 minutes.
A clear confirmation message, including appointment details, shall be displayed upon successful booking.

functionalRequirements.title: Automated Appointment Reminders
functionalRequirements.description: The system shall automatically send reminders to customers prior to their scheduled appointments.
acceptance_criteria: Customers shall receive an email reminder 24 hours before their scheduled appointment time.
The reminder email shall include the appointment date, time, service name, and booking reference.
The system shall allow for configuration of reminder timing by administrators (e.g., 48h, 24h).

functionalRequirements.title: Administrator Booking Management
functionalRequirements.description: Administrative users shall have the capability to view, create, modify, and cancel customer appointments through a dedicated admin interface.
acceptance_criteria: Admins shall be able to view all appointments in a searchable and filterable calendar or list format.
Admins shall be able to manually create a new booking for a customer, assigning a service, date, and time.
Admins shall be able to modify the date, time, or service for an existing appointment.
Admins shall be able to cancel an appointment and optionally send a cancellation notification to the customer.

functionalRequirements.title: Service and Availability Management
functionalRequirements.description: Administrators shall be able to define, edit, and manage the services offered and set the booking availability for each service.
acceptance_criteria: Admins shall be able to add, modify, and delete services, including service name, description, and duration.
Admins shall be able to define recurring weekly availability schedules (e.g., Mon-Fri, 9 AM - 5 PM).
Admins shall be able to block specific dates or time ranges for holidays, staff unavailability, or special events.

functionalRequirements.title: Customer Booking History and Self-Service
functionalRequirements.description: Authenticated customers shall be able to view their upcoming and past appointments, and within defined business rules, reschedule or cancel their own existing bookings.
acceptance_criteria: Logged-in customers shall be able to view a personal dashboard listing their current and past appointments.
Customers shall be able to reschedule an upcoming appointment up to 24 hours before the original booking time.
Customers shall be able to cancel an upcoming appointment up to 48 hours before the original booking time.

nonFunctionalRequirements.title: Performance - Response Time
nonFunctionalRequirements.description: The system shall load pages and respond to user actions (e.g., booking submission) within 3 seconds under typical load conditions (up to 100 concurrent users).

nonFunctionalRequirements.title: Security - Data Protection
nonFunctionalRequirements.description: All customer personal identifiable information (PII) shall be encrypted both in transit (using HTTPS) and at rest (in the database).

nonFunctionalRequirements.title: Usability - Intuitive Interface
nonFunctionalRequirements.description: The customer-facing booking interface shall be intuitive, easy to navigate, and require no prior training for typical users.

nonFunctionalRequirements.title: Reliability - System Uptime
nonFunctionalRequirements.description: The system shall achieve an annual uptime of 99.5%, excluding planned maintenance windows.

nonFunctionalRequirements.title: Scalability - Concurrent Operations
nonFunctionalRequirements.description: The system shall be capable of supporting up to 100 concurrent customer booking operations and 10 concurrent administrator management operations without significant performance degradation.

assumptions: Customers will have reliable internet access and a valid email address to utilize the system's features, including online booking and reminder reception.
The initial scope assumes the system will manage appointments for a single business entity or location, with a single set of services and staff availability.
Integration with external systems such as payment gateways, existing CRM platforms, or marketing automation tools is considered out of scope for the initial release.
The business will provide comprehensive and accurate data regarding services offered, their durations, and daily operational hours and policies.
All users (customers and administrators) are expected to use modern web browsers (e.g., Chrome, Firefox, Edge, Safari).
constraints: The system must be implemented as a web-based application, accessible via standard desktop and mobile web browsers.
The initial development and deployment of the Minimum Viable Product (MVP) must be completed within 6 months from the project initiation date.
The system must adhere to standard data privacy and protection regulations (e.g., GDPR principles for EU customers, CCPA for California customers) for handling customer personal information.
The project budget for development and initial deployment is fixed at $XXX,XXX (Placeholder for a realistic budget if known, otherwise generic).
acceptanceCriteria: Customers can successfully browse services, view availability, book, reschedule, and cancel appointments online without assistance.
Administrative staff can efficiently manage all aspects of appointments, services, and availability with an average task completion time reduction of 20% compared to manual methods.
Automated appointment reminders are consistently sent and received by customers, leading to a measurable reduction in no-shows (e.g., 15% reduction).
The system meets all defined non-functional requirements, including performance, security, and uptime targets.
All key stakeholders (customers, administrators, business owners) express satisfaction with the system's functionality and usability during user acceptance testing.
